NidoSyncState.title: NidoSyncState
NidoSyncState.description: All synchronized data for the application including profile, tasks, appointments, savedIdeas, and chalkboardNotes.

profile.description: Insignia profile for partners, anniversary date and accrued scores

tasks.description: Daily or weekly recurring household chores

savedIdeas.description: Gemini generated ideas saved for later

nido_sync/state.description: The master document containing the full application synchronized state.
